title: Geometric Construction of the Resultant
body: Three displacement vectors A, B, and C have magnitudes $$A=10.0$$ cm, $$B=7.0$$ cm, $$C=8.0$$ cm and direction angles $$\alpha=35\degree$$, $$β=-110\degree$$, $$γ=30\degree$$ from the horizontal. Find the following vector sums: (a) $$R=A+B$$, (b) $$D=A-B$$, and (c) S=A-3B+C.\n##figure3.gif
